title: Real-Time Action Chunking with Large Models
summary: A real-time system for large VLA models that maintains precision and speed in the face of high-latency environments.
body: Action chunking reduces effective policy latency by predicting executable motion segments ahead of time.
We combine chunk-level correction with low-level feedback to preserve precision under network and compute delays.
The resulting controller improves throughput without sacrificing manipulation quality.
